_comment: Empirically-resolved SUMO default passenger vType parameters, dumped via libsumo/TraCI. Ground truth for the vType init cross-check. vType declared only vClass='passenger' (no overrides), so every value is a pure vClass default. NOTE: the rung-1 scenario overrides sigma=0 and speeddev=0 for determinism; those overrides are in the scenario rou/cfg, not reflected here.
